TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear_pawan 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: qmnitaku kingan a seediq a gaga mangan a hei qhuni.
S.PHON: qmnitaku kiŋan a seediq a gaga maŋan a ħei qħuni.
S.FORM: qmnitaku kingan a seediq a gaga mangan a hei qhuni.
S.PHON: qmnitaku kiŋan a seediq a gaga maŋan a ħei qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 我看過有一個人正在摘樹果.
I have seen one person picking fruits.

S.FORM: ma eyahanna smeli dheran han ma musa mangal baro duri.
S.PHON: ma ejaħanna smeli dħeɾan ħan ma musa maŋal baɾo duɾi.
S.FORM: ma eyahanna smeli dheran han ma musa mangal baro duri.
S.PHON: ma ejaħanna smeli dħeɾan ħan ma musa maŋal baɾo duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他先下來將水果收集在地上,再上去摘.
He first came down and gathered the fruits on the ground and then went up to pick again.

S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari de meyah kingan meyah kingan a laqi taapa jidensha.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi de mejaħ kiŋan mejaħ kiŋan a laqi taapa jidensħa.
S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari de meyah kingan meyah kingan a laqi taapa jidensha.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi de mejaħ kiŋan mejaħ kiŋan a laqi taapa jidensħa.
S.TRANSL: 不久來了一個騎腳踏車的小孩.
Soon there came a child riding a bicycle.

S.FORM: meyah a meyah a meyah a mangan a hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: mejaħ a mejaħ a mejaħ a maŋan a ħei qħuni kija.
S.FORM: meyah a meyah a meyah a mangan a hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: mejaħ a mejaħ a mejaħ a maŋan a ħei qħuni kija.
S.TRANSL: 他來拿那些樹果.
He came to take away those tree fruits.

S.FORM: meyah meyah mangal hei qhuni nangal rudan kiya.
S.PHON: mejaħ mejaħ maŋal ħei qħuni naŋal ɾudan kija.
S.FORM: meyah meyah mangal hei qhuni nangal rudan kiya.
S.PHON: mejaħ mejaħ maŋal ħei qħuni naŋal ɾudan kija.

TRANSL.notes: (他)來拿那個老人摘下來的樹果.

S.TRANSL: 來拿那個老人摘下來的樹果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) came to take the tree fruits the old man picked.

S.TRANSL: came to take the tree fruits the old man picked.

S.FORM: ma ma wadana posaun jidensha han ma kika bobona wada di.
S.PHON: ma ma wadana posaun jidensħa ħan ma kika bobona wada di.
S.FORM: ma ma wadana posaun jidensha han ma kika bobona wada di.
S.PHON: ma ma wadana posaun jidensħa ħan ma kika bobona wada di.

TRANSL.notes: 他把(它們)放在腳踏車之後就離開了.

S.TRANSL: 他把 放在腳踏車之後就離開了.

TRANSL.notes: And he put (them) on the bicycle and then left.

S.TRANSL: And he put on the bicycle and then left.

S.FORM: wa um wada di ma kika wada moda ptebuk a an btunux ka jidenshana kiya ma.
S.PHON: wa um wada di ma kika wada moda ptebuk a an btunux ka jidensħana kija ma.
S.FORM: wa um wada di ma kika wada moda ptebuk a an btunux ka jidenshana kiya ma.
S.PHON: wa um wada di ma kika wada moda ptebuk a an btunux ka jidensħana kija ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他離開了,所以在路上腳踏車碰到石頭.
And he left and so his bicycle hit a stone on the way.

S.FORM: kiya ka wada takur di ma wada cuwaq a a hei qhuni pnusana rarawa nii.
S.PHON: kija ka wada takuɾ di ma wada ʦuwaq a a ħei qħuni pnusana ɾaɾawa nii.
S.FORM: kiya ka wada takur di ma wada cuwaq a a hei qhuni pnusana rarawa nii.
S.PHON: kija ka wada takuɾ di ma wada ʦuwaq a a ħei qħuni pnusana ɾaɾawa nii.

TRANSL.notes: 所以(他)就跌倒了,然後裝在籃子裡的水果就倒出來.

S.TRANSL: 所以 就跌倒了,然後裝在籃子裡的水果就倒出來.

TRANSL.notes: So (he) fell and the tree fruits put in the basket poured out.

S.TRANSL: So fell and the tree fruits put in the basket poured out.

S.FORM: ma meyah a meyah ka teru a seediq meyah ma eyahandaha tmutuy di.
S.PHON: ma mejaħ a mejaħ ka teɾu a seediq mejaħ ma ejaħandaħa tmutuj di.
S.FORM: ma meyah a meyah ka teru a seediq meyah ma eyahandaha tmutuy di.
S.PHON: ma mejaħ a mejaħ ka teɾu a seediq mejaħ ma ejaħandaħa tmutuj di.

TRANSL.notes: 然後來了三個人他們扶(他)起來.

S.TRANSL: 然後來了三個人他們扶 起來.
Then three people came and helped him up.

S.FORM: ma ma kika posaundaha p p law a posaun lmuundaha ka hei qhuni kiya ma posaundaha rawa dungan ma kika.
S.PHON: ma ma kika posaundaħa p p law a posaun lmuundaħa ka ħei qħuni kija ma posaundaħa ɾawa duŋan ma kika.
S.FORM: ma ma kika posaundaha p p law a posaun lmuundaha ka hei qhuni kiya ma posaundaha rawa dungan ma kika.
S.PHON: ma ma kika posaundaħa p p law a posaun lmuundaħa ka ħei qħuni kija ma posaundaħa ɾawa duŋan ma kika.

TRANSL.notes: 他們把樹果撿起來後,還(把它們)放到籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 他們把樹果撿起來後,還 放到籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: They picked up the tree fruits and also put (them) into the basket.

S.TRANSL: They picked up the tree fruits and also put into the basket.

S.FORM: a posaundaha jidensha di ma.
S.PHON: a posaundaħa jidensħa di ma.
S.FORM: a posaundaha jidensha di ma.
S.PHON: a posaundaħa jidensħa di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 他們(把水果)放到腳踏車上.

S.TRANSL: 他們 放到腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: They put (the fruits) on the bicycle.

S.TRANSL: They put on the bicycle.

S.FORM: seediq tnaapa jitensya kiya duwe ini a kiya ini taapa jidensha di wada mkkesa cmikul di.
S.PHON: seediq tnaapa jitensja kija duwe ini a kija ini taapa jidensħa di wada mkkesa ʦmikul di.
S.FORM: seediq tnaapa jitensya kiya duwe ini a kiya ini taapa jidensha di wada mkkesa cmikul di.
S.PHON: seediq tnaapa jitensja kija duwe ini a kija ini taapa jidensħa di wada mkkesa ʦmikul di.
S.TRANSL: 本來騎車的那個人不騎車了,而是走路推車.
The person who had ridden the bike didn't ride a bike, but walked and pushed the bike.

S.FORM: ma ma bobona daha uh teru seediq teru seediq ka meyah a moda siyo a pusu qhuni hiya.
S.PHON: ma ma bobona daħa uħ teɾu seediq teɾu seediq ka mejaħ a moda sijo a pusu qħuni ħija.
S.FORM: ma ma bobona daha uh teru seediq teru seediq ka meyah a moda siyo a pusu qhuni hiya.
S.PHON: ma ma bobona daħa uħ teɾu seediq teɾu seediq ka mejaħ a moda sijo a pusu qħuni ħija.
S.TRANSL: 之後,來了三個人,經過那顆樹旁邊.
Afterwards, three people came and passed by that tree.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka munu rudan mnusa baro duwe e qitaanna bale ka angalanna nii.
S.PHON: ma kija ka munu ɾudan mnusa baɾo duwe e qitaanna bale ka aŋalanna nii.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka munu rudan mnusa baro duwe e qitaanna bale ka angalanna nii.
S.PHON: ma kija ka munu ɾudan mnusa baɾo duwe e qitaanna bale ka aŋalanna nii.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個上去的老人,他仔細看著他採的東西.
Then the old man who went up, he looked at what he picked carefully.

S.FORM: ye maanu gagana ye lngelungun ye u ye wada gedang ye so.
S.PHON: je maanu gagana je lŋeluŋun je u je wada gedaŋ je so.
S.FORM: ye maanu gagana ye lngelungun ye u ye wada gedang ye so.
S.PHON: je maanu gagana je lŋeluŋun je u je wada gedaŋ je so.
S.TRANSL: 他在想:「是不是有東西掉了?」
He was thinking, "Is anything lost?"

S.FORM: a ye so kenu ka nodaanna.
S.PHON: a je so kenu ka nodaanna.
S.FORM: a ye so kenu ka nodaanna.
S.PHON: a je so kenu ka nodaanna.
S.TRANSL: 究竟是發生什麼事?
What happened exactly?

S.FORM: a inimu kelai kiya di.
S.PHON: a inimu kelai kija di.
S.FORM: a inimu kelai kiya di.
S.PHON: a inimu kelai kija di.
S.TRANSL: 那個我就不知道了.
That, I don't know.
